title: 10 best herbal teas for hyperthyroidism
intro_desc: Herbal teas for hyperthyroidism are a natural and complementary approach to managing this condition, which occurs when the thyroid gland produces excessive hormones, leading to various symptoms and health issues. These teas help alleviate symptoms such as anxiety, weight loss, and rapid heartbeat by balancing hormone production and reducing inflammation. The best herbal teas for hyperthyroidism include Astragalus membranaceus, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Silybum marianum, Schisandra chinensis, Zingiber officinale, Withania somnifera, Taraxacum officinale, Cynara scolymus, Lavandula angustifolia, and Scutellaria baicalensis. If left untreated, hyperthyroidism can significantly impact daily life, causing fatigue, mood swings, and difficulty sleeping, ultimately affecting overall well-being and quality of life.
